title: alnus jorullensis
intro: Alnus jorullensis, also known as the Jorull's alder, is a species of flowering plant in the family Betulaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which are derived from its bark, leaves, and roots. The health benefits of Alnus jorullensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Alnus jorullensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including colds, coughs, and skin infections.
